name: Kodif
description: Autonomous AI customer support platform for e-commerce covering cart recovery, returns and subscriptions.

seo.title: Kodif — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Kodif: Autonomous AI customer support platform for e-commerce covering cart recovery, returns and subscriptions.

when_to_use: Autonomous AI handling e-commerce returns and refund requests
Cart recovery automation via AI-driven support conversations
Subscription cancellation deflection with AI-offered alternatives
Order status resolution bot for high-volume e-commerce support
AI agent reducing human escalations for tier-1 e-commerce queries

pros: Built for e-commerce workflows out of the box
Integrates with Shopify and major CX tools
cons: Narrow focus on commerce use cases
Model tuning still needs human oversight
review.verdict: A focused e-commerce AI agent that handles real actions, not just answers.
review.best_for: Shopify and DTC brands automating refunds, returns, and subscription support at scale.
review.not_for: B2B SaaS, non-commerce verticals, or buyers wanting a generic chatbot.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
